name: Sparkline
description: Inline SVG trend chart primitive — line, area, or bars for tables and KPI strips.

api.name: Sparkline
api.description: Inline SVG trend chart primitive — line, area, or bars for tables and KPI strips.

parameters.name: Values
parameters.description: The data series to plot. A null or empty series renders a faint flat baseline instead of a chart. A single value renders as a flat line across the full width.

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: Height of the chart in px. The viewBox width is always normalized to 100 units, so the SVG scales to fill its container's width. Default: 32.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: CSS color for the line/bars/area. Defaults to the theme's primary color (var(--color-primary, currentColor)) when unset.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: Chart shape: a connected Line (default), a filled Area under the line, or discrete Bars.

parameters.name: ShowArea
parameters.description: Fills the area under the line, without switching Type to Area explicitly.

parameters.name: ShowLast
parameters.description: Highlights the last data point with a filled dot.

parameters.name: ShowTooltips
parameters.description: Render a marker dot at every data point with a native SVG <title> (hover tooltip showing the value) — point highlight + tooltips with no JS. Off by default. (#275)

parameters.name: StrokeWidth
parameters.description: Line/outline stroke width. Applied with vector-effect="non-scaling-stroke" so it stays a constant pixel width regardless of the SVG's scaled size. Default: 1.5.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible name for the chart (aria-label on the svg, role="img"). Default: "Trend".

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root svg.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the root svg.

mdSummary:
# Sparkline

Inline SVG trend chart primitive — line, area, or bars for tables and KPI strips.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Status & Indicators
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/sparkline

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Sparkline | Values | `IEnumerable<double>?` | `` | The data series to plot. A null or empty series renders a faint flat baseline instead of a chart. A single value renders as a flat line across the full width. |
| Sparkline | Height | `int` | `32` | Height of the chart in px. The viewBox width is always normalized to 100 units, so the SVG scales to fill its container's width. Default: 32. |
| Sparkline | Color | `string?` | `` | CSS color for the line/bars/area. Defaults to the theme's primary color (var(--color-primary, currentColor)) when unset. |
| Sparkline | Type | `SparkType` | `SparkType.Line` | Chart shape: a connected Line (default), a filled Area under the line, or discrete Bars. |
| Sparkline | ShowArea | `bool` | `` | Fills the area under the line, without switching Type to Area explicitly. |
| Sparkline | ShowLast | `bool` | `` | Highlights the last data point with a filled dot. |
| Sparkline | ShowTooltips | `bool` | `` | Render a marker dot at every data point with a native SVG <title> (hover tooltip showing the value) — point highlight + tooltips with no JS. Off by default. (#275) |
| Sparkline | StrokeWidth | `double` | `1.5` | Line/outline stroke width. Applied with vector-effect="non-scaling-stroke" so it stays a constant pixel width regardless of the SVG's scaled size. Default: 1.5. |
| Sparkline | AriaLabel | `string?` | `"Trend"` | Accessible name for the chart (aria-label on the svg, role="img"). Default: "Trend". |
| Sparkline | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root svg. |
| Sparkline | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the root svg. |
